div1.entryFree: Principle, a truth, a rule: these warlike --s do not throw from you, All's II, 1, 1. that need must needs infer this p. that faith would live again by death of need, John III, 1, 213. if I had a thousand sons, the first humane p. I would teach them should be, to forswear thin potations, H4B IV, 3, 133.
